**PR title must follow Conventional Commits:** `type(scope): description`

Examples: `feat(detector): add flash-loan callback check`, `fix(cli): correct exit code when using --baseline`, `docs(readme): update install instructions`

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
